_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.
_publications._context: Human 293T cells (used for lentiviral packaging), sNF96.2 (a MPNST cell line derived from a patient with NF1, used as target cells) | FH-DCAF1 and FH-Lats1 (purified from 293T cells) were incubated in 20 μl reaction buffer | Low passage 293T cells for large-scale lentiviral packaging were obtained from TRC

_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin/NF2 loss-driven tumorigenesis linked to CRL4(DCAF1)-mediated inhibition of the hippo pathway kinases Lats1 and 2 in the nucleus.
A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.
